nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment variable template for OriStudio defining app config, SQLite database URL, Redis connection, server ports, workspace path, and optional external API keys for blockchain notary, vision, and LLM gateways.

nodes.name: .owasp-nist-snapshot.md
nodes.summary: Scraped snapshot of NIST SP 800-63 Digital Identity Guidelines covering authentication and lifecycle management specifications from the official NIST website.

nodes.name: .owasp-owasp-auth-snapshot.md
nodes.summary: Scraped snapshot of the OWASP Cheat Sheet Series page on Authentication, providing security best-practice guidelines for identity verification flows.

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Build orchestration Makefile with targets for dependency installation, dev server startup (backend + frontend), database initialization and Alembic migrations, test execution, linting with Ruff/ESLint, formatting, cleanup, and Docker compose operations.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: OriStudio project overview: personal creator toolchain for the full creative-to-monetization lifecycle. Covers core features (data sovereignty, offline-first, incremental complexity), tech stack (Vue 3/FastAPI/SQLite), quick-start instructions, project structure, and phased development roadmap.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose definition for OriStudio: backend API service, Redis cache, Celery worker, and Celery beat scheduler, all built from the backend Dockerfile with shared environment variables and Redis volume persistence.

nodes.name: start.sh
nodes.summary: One-click OriStudio launcher script creating Python virtual environments, installing dependencies, running DB migrations, and starting both frontend (Vite) and backend (Uvicorn) dev servers with configurable ports.
